2021-22 Evansville Purple Aces Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 6-24 (2-16, 10th in MVC MBB)

Coach: Todd Lickliter

PS/G: 59.2 (354th of 358)

PA/G: 70.7 (224th of 358)

SRS: -10.95 (304th of 358)

SOS: 1.40 (119th of 358)

ORtg: 90.3 (351st of 358)

DRtg: 108.0 (327th of 358)

Preseason Odds: Championship +100000
